node.statement: FINITE-SKELETAL-FUSION-DATA-001: Lean defines a finite skeletal fusion-data structure consisting of a finite label type, a distinguished unit label, natural-number fusion multiplicities, and left/right unit fusion laws. This formalises only the finite label/multiplicity skeleton of the locally sourced skeletal fusion category description. Lean instantiates this structure with the accepted finite Fibonacci fusion table and proves multiplicity-freeness plus total left/right unit multiplicity one. Julia and WolframScript independently check the Fibonacci table, multiplicity-free condition, unit laws, and unit total multiplicities. This does not construct a fusion category, associators, F-symbols, pentagon equations, duals, Hilbert Hom spaces, or categorical reconstruction from skeletal data.
